en.portfolio_title: Our Work
en.portfolio_subtitle: Explore our selected projects showcasing our expertise in web, mobile, and enterprise solutions.
en.portfolio_hero_desc: Discover how we help businesses transform their operations through custom digital solutions.
en.portfolio_item1_desc: A comprehensive digital attendance solution streamlining HR operations with real-time tracking and analytics.
en.portfolio_item2_desc: Telemedicine platform connecting patients with specialized doctors via secure video consultations.
en.port_web_hero_desc: Web solutions we build — from high-converting landing pages to scalable SaaS platforms.
en.port_card_desc_0: MSME e-commerce platform with multi-vendor features, local payment gateway, and real-time seller dashboard.
en.port_card_desc_1: Web-based inventory management system for mid-scale manufacturing with automated reports.
en.port_card_desc_2: SaaS product landing page with premium animations, integrated A/B testing, and 4.2% conversion rate.
en.port_card_desc_3: Multi-language (ID/EN) corporate website with headless CMS, integrated blog, and 98/100 SEO score.
en.port_card_desc_4: Integrated HR platform with AI-based attendance, payroll, and performance review modules.
en.port_card_desc_5: B2B marketplace for Yogyakarta batik artisans with AR try-on feature and online auction system.
en.port_cta_desc: Let's discuss how we can help turn your idea into an outstanding digital product.
en.port_mob_hero_desc: High-performance native and cross-platform apps with seamless UX for iOS & Android.
en.port_cs_hero_desc: Dive deep into how we solve complex problems and deliver real impact for our clients.
en.port_card_desc_6: Personal finance app with automatic tracking, budget planner, and weekly visual reports.
en.port_card_desc_7: Local food delivery app with real-time tracking and QRIS payment integration.
en.port_card_desc_8: Health monitoring app integrated with smartwatches to track vitals and sleep patterns.
en.port_card_desc_9: Interactive learning platform with gamification, video streaming, and online quizzes.
en.port_card_desc_10: Virtual tour guide app with interactive maps, audio guides, and ticket booking.
en.port_card_title_11: InventoPro — Efisiensi Operasional Pabrik via Dashboard Real-time
en.port_card_desc_11: Digitizing inventory tracking from manual paper-based to a real-time barcode-integrated system.
en.port_card_title_12: DompetKu — Akuisisi 12.000 Pengguna Organik dalam 90 Hari
en.port_card_desc_12: Optimizing checkout flow and UI/UX to increase sales conversion and reduce cart abandonment.
en.port_card_desc_13: Creating an internal communication platform and centralized data dashboard for 500+ employees.
en.port_card_title_14: TeamSync HRMS — Memangkas Waktu Proses HR dari 3 Hari ke 4 Jam
en.port_card_desc_14: Rebranding and rebuilding a corporate website into a modern, accessible, and fast web app.

id.portfolio_title: Hasil Karya Kami
id.portfolio_subtitle: Intip deretan proyek seru yang udah kami kerjain, mulai dari web, mobile, sampai solusi enterprise.
id.portfolio_hero_desc: Cari tahu gimana cara kami bantu berbagai bisnis buat transformasi pakai solusi digital buatan kami.
id.portfolio_item1_desc: Sistem absensi digital komplit yang bikin kerjaan HR jadi jauh lebih gampang berkat pantauan real-time dan analitik mendetail.
id.portfolio_item2_desc: Platform telemedicine yang ngehubungin pasien sama dokter spesialis lewat konsultasi video yang aman.
id.port_web_hero_desc: Solusi web yang kami bangun — dari landing page konversi tinggi hingga platform SaaS yang skalabel.
id.port_card_desc_0:
Platform e-commerce UMKM dengan fitur multi-vendor, payment gateway lokal, dan dashboard
        penjual real-time.
id.port_card_desc_1:
Sistem manajemen inventaris berbasis web untuk usaha manufaktur skala menengah dengan
        laporan otomatis.
id.port_card_desc_2:
Landing page produk SaaS dengan animasi premium, A/B testing terintegrasi, dan conversion
        rate 4.2%.
id.port_card_desc_3:
Website corporate multi-bahasa (ID/EN) dengan CMS headless, blog terintegrasi, dan SEO score
        98/100.
id.port_card_desc_4:
Platform HR terintegrasi dengan modul absensi, penggajian, dan performance review berbasis
        AI.
id.port_card_desc_5:
Marketplace B2B untuk pengrajin batik Yogyakarta dengan fitur AR try-on dan sistem lelang
        online.
id.port_cta_desc: Mari diskusikan bagaimana kami dapat membantu mewujudkan ide Anda menjadi produk digital yang luar biasa.
id.port_mob_hero_desc: Aplikasi native dan cross-platform dengan performa tinggi dan UX yang mulus untuk iOS & Android.
id.port_cs_hero_desc: Pelajari lebih dalam bagaimana kami memecahkan masalah kompleks dan memberikan dampak nyata bagi klien kami.
id.port_card_desc_6:
Aplikasi keuangan pribadi dengan fitur pencatatan otomatis, budget planner, dan laporan
        visual mingguan.
id.port_card_desc_7:
Aplikasi pesan antar makanan lokal dengan fitur tracking real-time dan integrasi pembayaran
        QRIS.
id.port_card_desc_8:
Aplikasi monitoring kesehatan dengan integrasi wearable device, reminder obat, dan
        konsultasi dokter online.
id.port_card_desc_9:
Platform belajar online untuk pelajar SMA dengan fitur video pembelajaran, kuis interaktif,
        dan leaderboard.
id.port_card_desc_10:
Panduan wisata Yogyakarta offline-first dengan AR landmark recognition dan rekomendasi
        kuliner terdekat.
id.port_card_title_11: InventoPro — Efisiensi Operasional Pabrik via Dashboard Real-time
id.port_card_desc_11:
Manufaktur · Semarang — Implementasi sistem monitoring stok otomatis, mengurangi kesalahan
        input manual dari 23% menjadi 0.4%.
id.port_card_title_12: DompetKu — Akuisisi 12.000 Pengguna Organik dalam 90 Hari
id.port_card_desc_12:
FinTech · Nasional — Strategi onboarding + referral loop yang mendorong pertumbuhan organik
        tanpa anggaran ikberbayar.
id.port_card_desc_13:
Corporate · Surabaya — Rebuilding website lama ke Astro + Sanity CMS dengan arsitektur
        SEO-first yang terstruktur.
id.port_card_title_14: TeamSync HRMS — Memangkas Waktu Proses HR dari 3 Hari ke 4 Jam
id.port_card_desc_14:
Enterprise · Bandung — Otomasi alur approval multi-level untuk 400+ karyawan dengan
        integrasi payroll BPJS otomatis.
